views.markdown:
**AntiDarkSword** hardens jailbroken iOS devices against zero-click attacks, spyware, and WebKit exploits.

• Blocks iMessage auto-download & preview-based payloads  
• Disables risky WebKit features (WebGL, WebRTC, file access)  
• Restricts background daemons used in exploit chains  
• Spoofs environment & User-Agent to break payload targeting  

Supports rootless and rootful setups with adjustable system-wide protection levels.

## Version 1.0.0
• Initial release

## Version 1.0.1
• Minor fixes and improvements

[GitHub Repository](https://github.com/EolnMsuk/AntiDarkSword)

Report issues or contribute on GitHub.
